data.evidence: README documents repo-local workflow pilot; npm run check, git diff --check, stack validate and readback passed.

Public repo-complete scaffold applied; GitHub visibility/description/homepage/topics set public-ready; npm run check passed; repo-local validate/readback passed; repo_complete public validate is DEELTIJD only due documented filename false positives in docs/public-readiness-review.md.

Reduced SEO baseline from 283 issue occurrences to 0 by hardening generated Skills registry metadata: normalized public descriptions, longer page titles, favicon/social/analytics head tags, regenerated skills pages/sitemap, and refreshed reports/seo baseline.

Next repo-local adoption step chosen: defer another website pilot and use go-workflow-stack for an exporter/importer or bridge-hardening slice; decision recorded in .go/decisions/events.jsonl; .go validate/readback and scripts/check.sh passed.

Nutrition artifact check green; 55 unit tests green; site/public-boundary/feed/timeline checks green across 140 pages; SEO 0 regressions; desktop and 390px mobile browser proof; chicken/salmon dashboard toggle and 10-row cost table exercised.

Primary AH API product/price/label data applied; package-clean 265g chickpeas, 225g+225g veg, 125g fruit, 250g salmon; nutrition JSON regenerated; 55 tests, site, timeline, boundary, feeds and SEO green; browser cost/macro render and zero overflow verified.

Muscle Meat broccoli 250g (€0.80) and green asparagus 100g (€1.25) replace AH veg; both packs yield exactly ten meals; Skyr 333g; generated totals/costs refreshed; no stale grilled/Italian/AH broccoli strings; 55 tests, site, SEO and browser render with zero overflow green.

Daily Muscle Meat Euromix 250g costs €0.60 and asparagus is reserved for weekly salmon day; chicken day €8.76, 6+1 week €63.92, 30-day €273.94; nutrition regenerated; 55 tests/site/SEO green; all three UI profile tabs and zero overflow verified.

All 11 ingredients now expose exact-used-portion kcal, protein, carbs, fat, fibre, salt and cost; expandable cards expose Vitamin A/C/D, folate, calcium, iron, potassium, choline and EPA+DHA with source evidence; 55 tests, 140-page site check and SEO green; browser rendered 11 rows/11 details with no page overflow.

npm run check:ci passed: 56 tests, 142 public pages, 0 SEO regressions; desktop browser QA passed with zero page overflow and clean current-site styling; 390px mobile screenshots passed for the case-study flow; public-safe scan found no credential or routing markers; timeline and sitemap connected.

npm test: 57 passed; npm run check:ci: passed (142 pages, 0 SEO regressions); git diff --check: passed; desktop browser: no console errors or horizontal overflow; mobile 390px screenshot: no clipping or horizontal overflow; public boundary scan: no credentials, chat IDs, or private markers
